title: We praise Thee, O God
publicDomainBasis: William Paton MacKay (1839–1885), John Jenkins Husband (1760–1825). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
We praise Thee, O God,
For the Son of Thy love,
For our Savior who died and
Is now gone above.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
We praise Thee, O God,
For Thy Spirit of light,
Who has shown us our Savior,
And scattered our night.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
All glory and praise
To Thee, Father of love,
For through Jesus’ redemption
Thy heart we may prove.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
We praise Thee again;
We are filled with Thy love,
And each heart is rekindled
With fire from above.
